arts.ttl: Napoli want to hold onto their lead in Parma
arts.sum: Napoli have won their last two away league games without conceding goal (against Monza and Lecce) and the Partenopei could win three away matches in a row without conceding goal in Serie A for the first time since between January and March 2023 (six in that case). In the last 14 matches at the Tardini stadium between Parma and Napoli in Serie A, there’s been six wins each and two draws with 21 goals for the Ducali against 20 goals for the Partenopei.
